title: WebDrop official device icon cache polish

approval.notes: User requested direct cleanup, version bump, verification, and push to main.

packets.result: Inline brand markup was present, but circular monochrome chip styling and device classification made several devices appear generic or unofficial.
Service worker cache is versioned and cache-first for app assets, so a release version bump is required to avoid stale icon rendering.
Recommended pausing Dynamic Island animations when app motion is paused and updating stale version references.
Applied UI, version, cache, and verification-script fixes; QA passed.

checks: rendered nearby sheet light/dark smoke: passed
stale version reference search: passed for runtime/docs/scripts; historical agenthistory entry retained
